headline: A Million Dollar Portfolio Engineered to Pay $72,000 a Year Like Clockwork
summary: A $72,000 annual income covers what the median American household spends each year: mortgage, cars, groceries, utilities, and modest vacation. Replacing it entirely with investment income requires specific capital, and that number changes dramatically based on yield tolerance. Divide your income target by the yield to get capital required. The tradeoff at each level is ... A Million Dollar Portfolio Engineered to Pay $72,000 a Year Like Clockwork

headline: How to Pull $55,000 a Year Out of an $850,000 Brokerage Account
summary: An $850,000 brokerage account sounds like a lot of money until you do the math on what it actually pays. To pull $55,000 a year out of that account in income, you need every dollar working at roughly 6.5% yield. That is not impossible, but it puts you squarely in the moderate-to-aggressive range of the ... How to Pull $55,000 a Year Out of an $850,000 Brokerage Account
